text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek doesn't show up for training, so I
decide to go look for her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There! That should keep those buttons from
popping off.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Now then, what else did I get asked to do...
choice_data_list: Did someone ask you to do some sewing?
Did someone ask you to do some sewing?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! What brings you he—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! When did it get so late?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry. Silly me, getting carried away like
this...
choice_data_list: Please be more careful next time.
Please be more careful next time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I will... I apologize for being such a handful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I comfort Super Creek as she reflects on her
actions and we leave the classroom together.
